imagePullSecrets.description: contents of pod imagePullSecret in form 'name=[secretName]'; applied to all controllers

annotations.description: Add annotations to all CRD resources, e.g. "helm.sh/resource-policy": keep

imagePullSecrets.description: contents of pod imagePullSecret in form 'name=[secretName]'; applied to all controllers

defaultServiceAccount.description:
All Kustomizations and HelmReleases which don’t have spec.serviceAccountName
specified, will use the default account from the tenant’s namespace.
Tenants have to specify a service account in their Flux resources to be able
to deploy workloads in their namespaces as the default account has no permissions.

annotations.description: Add annotations to all RBAC resources, e.g. "helm.sh/resource-policy": keep
Add annotations to all CRD resources, e.g. "helm.sh/resource-policy": keep

migration.description: Enable Flux CRs migration using helm pre upgrade hook job

extraObjects.description:
Array of extra K8s manifests to deploy
Example usage from https://fluxcd.io/docs/components/source/buckets/#static-authentication
- apiVersion: source.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2
kind: Bucket
metadata:
name: podinfo
namespace: default
spec:
interval: 1m
provider: generic
bucketName: podinfo
endpoint: minio.minio.svc.cluster.local:9000
insecure: true
secretRef:
name: minio-credentials
- apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
name: minio-credentials
namespace: default
type: Opaque
data:
accesskey: <BASE64>
secretkey: <BASE64>

affinity.description:
expects input structure as per specification https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.11/#toleration-v1-core
for example:
tolerations:
- key: foo.bar.com/role
operator: Equal
value: master
effect: NoSchedule

nodeSelector.description:
expects input structure as per specification https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.11/#affinity-v1-core
for example:
affinity:
nodeAffinity:
requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
nodeSelectorTerms:
- matchExpressions:
- key: foo.bar.com/role
operator: In
values:
- master

affinity.description:
expects input structure as per specification https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.11/#toleration-v1-core
for example:
tolerations:
- key: foo.bar.com/role
operator: Equal
value: master
effect: NoSchedule

nodeSelector.description:
expects input structure as per specification https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.11/#affinity-v1-core
for example:
affinity:
nodeAffinity:
requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
nodeSelectorTerms:
- matchExpressions:
- key: foo.bar.com/role
operator: In
values:
- master

imagePullSecrets.description: contents of pod imagePullSecret in form 'name=[secretName]'; applied to all controllers

extraSecretMounts.description:
Defines additional mounts with secrets.
Secrets must be manually created in the namespace or with kustomizeController.secret
- name: secret-files
mountPath: /etc/secrets
subPath: ""
secretName: secret-files
readOnly: true

envFrom.description: Defines envFrom using a configmap and/or secret.
Defines envFrom using a configmap and/or secret.

extraSecretMounts.description:
Defines additional mounts with secrets.
Secrets must be manually created in the namespace or with kustomizeController.secret
- name: secret-files
mountPath: /etc/secrets
subPath: ""
secretName: secret-files
readOnly: true

create.description: Create a secret to use it with extraSecretMounts. Defaults to false.

defaultServiceAccount.description:
All Kustomizations and HelmReleases which don’t have spec.serviceAccountName
specified, will use the default account from the tenant’s namespace.
Tenants have to specify a service account in their Flux resources to be able
to deploy workloads in their namespaces as the default account has no permissions.

enabled.description:
Implement the patches for Multi-tenancy lockdown.
See https://fluxcd.io/docs/installation/#multi-tenancy-lockdown

privileged.description:
Both kustomize-controller and helm-controller service accounts run privileged
with cluster-admin ClusterRoleBinding. Disable if you want to run them with a
minimum set of permissions.

prometheus.description: Enables podMonitor creation for the Prometheus Operator

annotations.description: Add annotations to all RBAC resources, e.g. "helm.sh/resource-policy": keep
Add annotations to all RBAC resources, e.g. "helm.sh/resource-policy": keep

createAggregation.description: Grant the Kubernetes view, edit and admin roles access to Flux custom resources
